meta.title: DGDH Runtime Cleanup Decision Matrix
meta.basis: CLI audit findings + baseline.json + runtime status

matrix.rationale: Primary operational company. All triad agents (CEO/Worker/Reviewer) belong to this company. Runtime heartbeat and all mission operations depend on it. No other companies exist in this runtime.
matrix.evidence: CLI: pnpm paperclipai company list shows 1 active company
matrix.riskIfRemoved: CRITICAL - Would destroy entire operational capability

matrix.rationale: Mission-critical triad role. Currently active and processing mission packets. Essential for triad-mission-loop-v1. No backup CEO exists.
matrix.evidence: CLI: pnpm paperclipai agent list shows CEO agent status=idle
matrix.riskIfRemoved: HIGH - Would break triad mission execution

matrix.rationale: Mission-critical triad role. Currently active. Required for executing bounded implementation work. Worker has proven execution capability on DAV-165, DAV-166, DAV-168.
matrix.evidence: CLI: pnpm paperclipai agent list shows Worker agent status=idle
matrix.riskIfRemoved: HIGH - Would break triad mission execution

matrix.rationale: Mission-critical triad role. Currently active. Required for verdict gate in triad-mission-loop-v1. Reviewer has proven capability on DAV-165, DAV-166.
matrix.evidence: CLI: pnpm paperclipai agent list shows Reviewer agent status=idle
matrix.riskIfRemoved: HIGH - Would break triad mission execution

matrix.rationale: Active core infrastructure. Contains server code, heartbeat logic, triad execution paths. Recent commits: 66ea2c7c, d7e78f99, 91ab7c99. Essential for operations.
Active core infrastructure. React 19 + Vite frontend. Required for operator-facing surfaces (health status, issue details, run chains).
Active operations project. Contains company-hq documents, mission cells, capability contracts. CURRENT.md lives here. Ongoing missions reference this project.
No activity in 45+ days. Superseded by current worktrees/dgdh-werkbank approach. Baseline shows no recent commits. No active issues reference this project.
matrix.evidence: baseline.json shows no commits in last 45 days

matrix.rationale: Active core infrastructure. Commander-based CLI. Essential for all operator interactions: paperclipai company list, agent list, runtime status, triad start/rescue.
matrix.evidence: baseline.json + CLI commands used in this audit
matrix.riskIfRemoved: CRITICAL - Would remove all operator tooling

matrix.rationale: Currently being worked. Includes DAV-168 (queued triad rerun), smoke-proof mission issues. These represent live mission work. Archiving would destroy work-in-progress.
matrix.riskIfRemoved: HIGH - Would lose active mission work

matrix.rationale: Stale blocked issues older than 30 days without resolution path. No child issues created, no recent activity. These consume triad attention without forward progress. Per CURRENT.md, reviewer-wake-retry is now automatic - old blocked issues won't auto-resume.
Completed work. Historical reference only. Includes DAV-165, DAV-166 (triad proof points), DAV-88 through DAV-97 (CEO routing proofs). These served their purpose and are now archival history.
matrix.evidence: CLI: issue list shows 62 done + git log references

matrix.rationale: Already in archived state. These are correctly classified. No action needed.
matrix.evidence: CLI: issue list includes archived flag

matrix.rationale: Historical success record. Valuable for metrics: success rate, execution time trends, model lane effectiveness (Flash vs Flash-Lite). These prove the triad works.
Debugging context. Failed runs contain error patterns that inform fixes. DAV-131 (blocked→resume) and others prove recovery paths. Historical failure modes are educational.
matrix.evidence: baseline.json references failed runs with error codes

matrix.rationale: Stale blocked runs without resume path. These runs are stuck in blocked state from old code paths. Reset to allow fresh execution if similar work is needed. Per CURRENT.md, new runs have automatic resume capability - these old ones don't.
matrix.evidence: CLI audit shows 23 blocked runs with no recent activity
matrix.riskIfRemoved: NONE - Reset clears state for fresh work

matrix.rationale: Already in archived state. No action needed.
matrix.evidence: CLI: runtime status includes archived runs

matrix.rationale: Active development worktree. Contains current branch dgdh/trio-only-harness-snapshot-20260328. All current work happens here. Runtime attached to this worktree.
matrix.riskIfRemoved: CRITICAL - Would destroy all current work

matrix.rationale: Historical backup worktree. Used for DAV-131 resume proof salvage. Contains old branch state. May be deleted after verification that all useful changes were ported.
Live baton. Source of truth for DGDH current state. Essential for all agents to understand context. Updated continuously (last: 2026-03-28 by Claude-Droid).
Audit baseline. Contains canonical counts for companies (1), agents (3), projects (5), issues (156), runs (89). This document references it. Essential for verification.
matrix.riskIfRemoved: MEDIUM - Would lose audit reference point

matrix.rationale: Markdown version of baseline. baseline.json is canonical. This is duplicate/redundant documentation. Can be regenerated from JSON if needed.
Service manifest. Single source of truth for commands and services. Required for all workers per AGENTS.md.
matrix.riskIfRemoved: HIGH - Would break mission worker procedures

matrix.rationale: CEO/Worker/Reviewer role templates. Essential for triad execution. Recent hardening in 1cc7ecc1 for closeout resume procedures.
matrix.riskIfRemoved: CRITICAL - Would break triad role behavior

nextMountain.description: Execute archival actions from this matrix
features: m2-archive-stale-issues - Archive the 47 stale blocked issues
m2-reset-blocked-runs - Reset the 23 stale blocked runs
m2-verify-cleanup - Verify cleanup via CLI audit

dgdpPrincipleAlignment.separationNotTruth: We do not destroy what has served us. We archive with gratitude.
dgdpPrincipleAlignment.technicalStrengthServesLife: Cleanup creates space for new work to breathe.
dgdpPrincipleAlignment.valueIsFuel: Preserving successful runs shows what works. Archiving stale issues frees attention.
dgdpPrincipleAlignment.missionAutonomy: This matrix enables self-carrying cleanup without David supervision per item.
